Coordinate Sheet — Signal Structure Theory
Version: v0.1
Author: Jacob Moses Bookbinder
Institution: Witness Grade Analytics (WGA)
Authority Level: SPEC / DEMO boundary

Abstract
Signal Structure Theory specifies a framework for determining whether distinctions persist under refinement. It formalizes collapse, persistence, and recurrence as structural properties observable across domains rather than narrative interpretations of events.

What Exists
• Mathematical framework defining structural admissibility under refinement
• Harmony Engine enforcing continuation control
• Archival corpus preserving witness-grade records
• Deterministic artifact pipelines
• Closure and receipt artifacts sealing generative steps

Core Claim
A distinction is admissible if and only if it persists under declared refinement.
HALT > INCOMPLETE > PASS

What Is Not Claimed
• Framework completeness
• Full corpus release
• Interpretive agreement
• Required adoption

Artifact Classes
• Pilgrim sealed text
• Semantic polynomial projections
• Kernel invariants
• Closure packets
• SHA256 receipts

Conclusion
Structure persists.
Verifiability governs continuation.

Jacob Moses Bookbinder
Witness Grade Analytics (WGA)
